description_long: This object is a vintage-style portable record player housed in a rectangular, red, hard-shell suitcase with a white handle and metallic latches. The lid is open, revealing a black turntable platter with a vinyl record, a tonearm, and a set of control buttons and switches on the right side. The interior of the lid is lined with a red material and features a GPO logo in the center. The exterior shows signs of wear, with scuffed and faded areas, giving it a retro, well-used appearance. The control panel includes several knobs and switches, likely for power, volume, and playback functions, as well as a visible speaker grille. The back of the case is plain, with a small port or connector visible near the bottom edge.
description: A retro red portable record player in a suitcase-style case, featuring a vinyl record, tonearm, and control panel with buttons and switches. The case shows visible wear and a GPO logo inside the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with GPO logo, vinyl record, tonearm, and full control panel with buttons and switches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the case, the open lid, and the arrangement of the control panel and tonearm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed, plain red back of the case with a small port or connector at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open lid, tonearm, and partial view of the control panel and handle.
